name: Dexamethasone
indications: Corticosteroid sintetiki ti n ṣiṣẹ pipẹ. Ti a lo fun edema cerebral (edema cerebral giga giga - HACE, TBI), awọn aati inira to lagbara, edema ọna atẹgun, ati idaamu adrenal. Anti-iredodo, kii ṣe anabolic.
Edema oju ọna afẹfẹ (stridor lẹhin extubation, kúrùpù)
Edema cerebral lati tumo tabi abscess
dose: Awọn aati aleji ti o lagbara (ni afikun si efinifirini)
route: Edema cerebral / HACE: 8-10 mg IV / IM ni ibẹrẹ, lẹhinna 4 mg q6h. Edema ọna afẹfẹ: 10 mg IV lẹẹkan. Kúrùpù: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (max 16mg). Idaamu adrenal: 4 mg IV.
warnings: HACE: Fun ni kutukutu bi o ti ṣee ṣe pẹlu isọkalẹ lẹsẹkẹsẹ.
Awọn akoran olu eto eto (laisi agbegbe antifungal)
Awọn ajesara ọlọjẹ laaye laarin awọn ọjọ 30 (i ibatan)
Ko ropo iran ati atẹgun fun HACE -- lo bi afikun nikan.

regional_names.generic: Hyperglycemia - ṣe abojuto glukosi ẹjẹ ni awọn alakan.

obstetric.note: Awọn abere ẹyọkan fun awọn pajawiri ni gbogbogbo ailewu pupọ.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
